FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about turning podcasts into video with PodVid
FAQ.contact: Still have questions? Contact us at

general.question: What is PodVid?
general.answer: PodVid is an AI video SaaS built for podcasters. It helps you turn podcast episodes, transcripts, and ideas into captioned clips, audiograms, and short social videos without a traditional editing workflow.

commercial.question: Can I use the videos for my show, clients, or sponsors?
commercial.answer: Yes. You can use PodVid outputs for your podcast marketing, client work, and sponsored content as long as you have the rights to the source material you upload.

aiModels.question: What kinds of podcast videos can I make?
aiModels.answer: You can create vertical clips, audiograms, captioned quote videos, and other short-form edits designed for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and similar channels.

credits.question: How does the credit system work?
credits.answer: Credits are used when you generate podcast videos. More demanding outputs or multiple variations consume more credits, so you can start small and scale up once a workflow works for your show.

refund.question: What if a generation fails?
refund.answer: If PodVid fails because of a system issue, we will credit the failed generation back whenever possible. If something looks wrong, contact support and we will help review it.

support.question: How can I get support?
support.answer: Email us at support@podvid.uk and include your episode or generation details. We can help with prompt setup, workflow questions, and any account issues.

Footer.tagline: Turn podcast episodes into short, shareable videos with AI.

resetPassword.subject: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your password for your PodVid account.
resetPassword.instruction: Click the button below to reset your password:
resetPassword.validity: This link will expire in 30 minutes and can only be used once.
resetPassword.security: For security reasons, this link expires after 30 minutes.
resetPassword.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
resetPassword.footer: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.
